testcase.name: test_register_accepts_team_designation

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration3_features.py:130: in test_register_accepts_team_designation assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_score_with_request_type_succeeds
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration3_features.py:150: in test_score_with_request_type_succeeds assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","content_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"title":"TEST_IT3_score","request_type":"internal_newsletter","brief":"Monthly newsletter for staff","content":"Hello team, this month..."},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_score_with_old_content_type_fails

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 422 for missing request_type, got 500: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 422 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration3_features.py:158: in test_score_with_old_content_type_fails assert r.status_code == 422, f"Expected 422 for missing request_type, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 422 for missing request_type, got 500: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 422 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration3_features.py:226: in test_accept_blocks_other_users_even_same_role assert reg.status_code == 200, reg.text E AssertionError: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_escalate_to_specific_user
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:1116: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_iteration3_features.py:269: in test_escalate_to_specific_user alt_vp_id = reg.json()["user"]["id"] ^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:1120: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
